context: Enterprise clients are requesting integrations with payroll systems. The engineering team is stretched across two parallel workstreams.

stage: Series B — expanding to SME market
context: The product was built for corporates but sales is pushing into the SME segment. The codebase is monolithic and the team is mid-migration to microservices.
Retention is the core metric. Students are dropping off after week 3. The team suspects the lack of peer interaction is the root cause.
The core product is 8 years old. A new React frontend is being built in parallel with the legacy system. The team is managing feature parity while shipping new capabilities.

product: Clinic appointment and patient management system
context: New clients are multi-site clinics requiring role-based access and cross-location reporting. Compliance with health data regulations is non-negotiable.
